footer.v: 1 - Phụ cấp chung, 2 - Phụ cấp chi tiết
1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phụ cấp %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục.' else N'The allowance %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phụ cấp %s1 hoặc kiểu phụ cấp đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit this item. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phụ cấp %s hoặc kiểu phụ cấp đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete this item. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phụ cấp %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The allowance %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_pc like rtrim(@ma_pc) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_pc) like rtrim(ma_pc) + '%')) begin select 'ma_pc' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_pc)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID update @hrdmpcct set ma_pc = @ma_pc

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_pc = $ma_pc.OldValue) begin select 'ma_pc' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_pc.OldValue)) as message return end
declare @allowanceType char(1) select @allowanceType = kieu_pc from @@table where ma_pc = $ma_pc.OldValue if (@ma_pc <> $ma_pc.OldValue or @kieu_pc <> @allowanceType) begin if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_pc like rtrim(@ma_pc) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_pc) like rtrim(ma_pc) + '%') and ma_pc <> $ma_pc.OldValue) begin select 'ma_pc' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_pc)) as message return end
if (exists(select 1 from hrctpc where ma_pc = $ma_pc.OldValue) or exists(select 1 from hrttctpc where ma_pc = $ma_pc.OldValue)) begin select 'ma_pc' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s1', rtrim($ma_pc.OldValue)) as message return end
if $hrdmpcct.NewValue = $hrdmpcct.OldValue begin update hrdmpcct set ma_pc = @ma_pc where ma_pc = $ma_pc.OldValue end end
if $hrdmpcct.NewValue <> $hrdmpcct.OldValue begin update @hrdmpcct set ma_pc = @ma_pc delete hrdmpcct where ma_pc = @ma_pc end
if $hrdmpcct.NewValue <> $hrdmpcct.OldValue insert into hrdmpcct select * from @hrdmpcct update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_pc = @ma_pc

if (exists(select 1 from hrctpc where ma_pc = @ma_pc) or exists(select 1 from hrttctpc where ma_pc = @ma_pc)) begin select 'ma_pc' as field, replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_pc)) as message return end delete hrdmpcct where ma_pc = @ma_pc
